Shell scripts for running benchmarks, stability tests, compliance tests, and unit tests locally and remotely.


## Files
- **[run-benchmarks.sh](run-benchmarks.sh.md)**: A shell script to run performance and memory benchmarks on JavaScript tests using a specified engine.
- **[run-stability-test.sh](run-stability-test.sh.md)**: A Bash script to test the stability of recent commits by running benchmarks on specified targets.
- **[run-test-suite-test262.sh](run-test-suite-test262.sh.md)**: A Bash script for parallel test262 compliance testing of a specified JavaScript engine.
- **[run-test-suite.sh](run-test-suite.sh.md)**: A shell script to run a test suite with an engine, supporting snapshot testing and result logging.
- **[run-tests-remote.sh](run-tests-remote.sh.md)**: A script to run tests on a remote board using SSH, with parameters for target, IP, login, and password.
- **[run-unittests-remote.sh](run-unittests-remote.sh.md)**: A Bash script to run unit tests on a remote board using SSH and SCP.
- **[run-unittests.sh](run-unittests.sh.md)**: A shell script to execute unit tests in a specified directory and report pass/fail results.
